title: pallenis spinosa subsp. spinosa
intro: Pallenis spinosa subsp. spinosa, also known as the prickly lettuce or sow thistle, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of Pallenis spinosa subsp. spinosa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support kidney function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
